content:
IVX LIVE EVIDENCE + DEPLOYMENT TOOLS BLOCK

Work only on:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Objective:
Finish IVX end-to-end deployment tools and live evidence proof.

ADD THESE TOOLS NOW:

1. GitHub Evidence Tool
- Read repo
- Read branch
- Read latest commit SHA
- Read latest commit timestamp
- Read files changed
- Confirm push status

2. Render Evidence Tool
- Read Render service
- Read latest deploy ID
- Read deploy status
- Read deploy timestamp
- Read deployed commit SHA
- Read build logs
- Trigger deploy if latest GitHub commit is not live

3. Health Evidence Tool
- Test /health
- Test /api/health
- Return HTTP status
- Return full response body
- Return response time
- Return live commit SHA

4. Chat Evidence Tool
- Send test message
- Receive assistant reply
- Save message
- Reload conversation
- Confirm message persisted
- Return conversation ID and message IDs

5. Supabase Evidence Tool
- Check connection
- List readable tables
- Count members
- Count waitlist
- Count chat conversations
- Count chat messages
- Confirm inserts and reads work

6. Frontend Evidence Tool
- Open production app
- Verify chat room loads
- Verify owner chat works
- Verify Monitor loads
- Verify Stream loads
- Verify Live Work loads
- Verify no TypeError: Network request failed

7. Live Evidence Dashboard
Create a Monitor section called:

LIVE DEPLOYMENT EVIDENCE

It must show:
- GitHub latest commit SHA
- Render deploy ID
- Render deployed commit SHA
- Commit match YES/NO
- /health HTTP status
- Chat API status
- Supabase status
- Chat save/load status
- Last verification time
- Final deployment status

8. Stream Evidence Logs
Stream must show live events:
- GitHub check started/completed
- Render deploy started/completed
- Health check started/completed
- Chat test started/completed
- Supabase test started/completed
- Frontend test started/completed
- Errors and retries

9. Live Work Actions
Add buttons:
- Run Full Evidence Check
- Trigger Render Deploy
- Verify Latest Commit Live
- Test Chat Room
- Test Supabase
- Generate Proof Report

10. Final Proof Report Format

Return:

REPO:
BRANCH:
LATEST_GITHUB_COMMIT:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_COMMIT:
COMMIT_MATCH:
HEALTH_STATUS:
HEALTH_RESPONSE_BODY:
CHAT_API_STATUS:
CHAT_SAVE_STATUS:
CHAT_LOAD_STATUS:
SUPABASE_STATUS:
MEMBERS_COUNT:
WAITLIST_COUNT:
FRONTEND_STATUS:
MONITOR_STATUS:
STREAM_STATUS:
LIVE_WORK_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
COMPLETE
BLOCKED
LOCAL ONLY
UNVERIFIED

RULE:
Do not say COMPLETE unless:
- GitHub commit exists
- Render deploy ID exists
- Render deployed commit matches latest GitHub commit
- /health returns 200
- Chat sends and saves messages
- Supabase read/write works
- Frontend chat loads live
